metadata.lyrics:
[00:43.01] Destination unknown
[00:46.69] 
[01:30.25] I left my job, my boss, my car and my home
[01:33.98] I'm leaving for a destination I still don't know
[01:37.63] Somewhere nobody must have duties at home
[01:41.46] And if you like this, you can follow me
[01:44.15] So let's go
[01:46.19] Follow me
[01:48.02] And let's go
[01:49.76] To the place where we belong
[01:51.77] And leave our troubles at home
[01:53.45] Come with me
[01:55.46] We can go
[01:57.20] To a paradise of love and joy
[01:59.77] A destination unknown
[02:20.97] 
[02:48.83] Now I won't feel those heavy shoulders no more
[02:52.60] My life got better now I finally enjoy
[02:56.37] Yes all the people wanna come here and so
[03:00.15] Come on and join us you can do that now
